jd_profile.raw_text:
Senior Full-Stack Engineer

About the Role
We are a fast-growing fintech startup building the next generation of payments infrastructure. We're looking for a Senior Full-Stack Engineer to join our platform team and help scale our core product to millions of users.

Responsibilities
- Design, build, and maintain high-performance APIs and backend services using Python (FastAPI/Django)
- Lead frontend development with React + TypeScript, building polished user interfaces
- Own the full software development lifecycle from architecture to deployment
- Collaborate with product and design teams to ship features quickly
- Conduct thorough code reviews and mentor junior engineers
- Drive technical architecture decisions and advocate for engineering best practices
- Work with our infrastructure team to maintain CI/CD pipelines and Kubernetes deployments

Required Skills
- Python (5+ years, FastAPI or Django)
- React + TypeScript (3+ years)
- PostgreSQL and Redis
- Docker and Kubernetes
- RESTful API design
- CI/CD pipelines (GitHub Actions, Jenkins)

Preferred Skills
- Go or Rust
- GraphQL
- AWS (EC2, RDS, Lambda, S3)
- Apache Kafka or RabbitMQ
- Microservices architecture
- Prior fintech / payments experience

Requirements
- 5+ years of professional software engineering experience
- Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or equivalent
- AWS Certified Developer or Solutions Architect certification is a plus
- Excellent communication skills â€” we're a remote-first team

Nice to Have
- Experience with real-time systems or event-driven architectures
- Open source contributions
- Experience at a fintech startup
